notes:
What's new in V3.1.3:
• 🎬 Veo 3.1 Lite — new budget-friendly Veo model supporting Text-to-Video, Image-to-Video, and Transition Mode in one. Up to 1080p
• ✂️ Story Cutter — longer transcripts now handled more reliably, faster processing, crash fix for very large files
• 🐛 Story Cutter — fixed a bug where analysis could get stuck at the UNDERSTAND step
• 🛠️ UI fix — removed duplicate GPT 1.5 entries from the model selector
